description: Warnings, enforcement actions, license registers, and consumer alerts from official financial regulators.
Platform-owned terms, privacy policies, proof-of-reserve pages, license pages, and support documents.
Explorer pages, contract records, token approvals, and transaction evidence.
Reports from reputable security researchers, audit firms, incident trackers, or threat intelligence teams.
Submitted complaints, screenshots, email records, chat logs, or support histories that require independent review.
